title: A question about events in webhooks
excerpt: I am pushing some events with webhooks. When type=create_pulse, can I separate the fields in the push event

posts.author: aaronchen (aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: I am pushing some events with webhooks. When type=create_pulse, can I separate the fields in the push event

posts.author: aaronchen (aaron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here are the test data，My idea is that when type=create_pulse, split the link phone email in the entire event message body and use webhooks to push

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @aaronchen,

I am not sure if I understand the question here but if you want to do is to change the payload in the webhook before it reaches your endpoint, it can not be done.

Let me know if that is what the question was!
